name: Green Tea Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring milk to a boil.
2. Remove from heat and add green tea powder.
3. Mix well.
4. In a separate bowl, beat egg yolks and sugar together until they form a ribbon.
5. Combine the egg mixture with milk in a saucepan. Cook over medium-high heat until just before it reaches a boil.
6. Remove from the heat and let cool completely over ice water.
7. Beat heavy cream and half-and-half over ice water until frothy.
8. Pour into the cooled egg mixture and mix well.
9. Process in an ice cream maker according to the manufacturer's instructions.
10. Freeze for 2-3 hours before serving.
